name: P.T. Bank Bumi Arta Tbk
summary: P.T. Bank Bumi Arta Tbk provides banking products and services in Indonesia. The company provides call and term deposits; and business financing solutions, including account, fixed, demand, house and car ownership, pension, term, multipurpose, export and import financing, and investment loans. In addition, it offers bank guarantee and payment services; ATM and mobile banking services; and other services, such as bank notes, corporate payroll, and bank drafts. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated a network of 10 branches, 22 sub-branches, 18 cash offices, and 9 payment points in Indonesia. P.T. Bank Bumi Arta Tbk was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
